title: SharePoint Online Permission and Group Membership Changes
spl:
index=o365 sourcetype="ms:o365:management" Workload=SharePoint earliest=-7d
| where match(Operation, "(?i)Add.*Member|Remove.*Member|Role|Permission|Group")
| eval actor=coalesce(UserId, UserPrincipalName, userId, "")
| eval target=coalesce(ObjectId, SiteUrl, "")
| stats count values(Operation) as operations by actor, target
| sort -count
description: Adds, removals, and role or permission changes in SharePoint often precede data exfiltration or persistence; centralizing them supports SOC detection and access certification.
value: Creates an auditor-friendly trail of entitlement drift for sensitive site collections without exporting separate CSVs from the compliance center.
implementation: Tune the `match` regex to your tenant’s exact `Operation` strings. Enrich `ObjectId` with a lookup of site sensitivity labels. Suppress known break-glass accounts. For high-volume tenants, summarize hourly before alerting.
